description: Solid of revolution using the disk method. Takes a 2D region from a g2d graph and revolves it around an axis.
utility: Visualize solids of revolution using the disk method from a 2D region

arguments.name: region
arguments.description: A 2D region created with region() on a g2d graph

examples.expression:
graph_1=g2d(at(3.8,29.9),19.4,21.4,range(-2,2),range(-2,2),type(plotting))
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"x^2",c(teal))
line_1=line(graph_1,"y = 0")
line_2=line(graph_1,"x = 0")
line_3=line(graph_1,"x = 1")
region_1=region(graph_1, plot_1, line_1, line_2, line_3)
revolve_1=revolvedisk(at(2,1),view(21,26),region_1,axis(x),fc(blue),rulings3d(64),sweep(0,360),slice(0.5))

_note: Solids of revolution use 2D regions from g2d graphs. Pipeline: g2d -> plot/line -> region() -> revolvedisk.
